name: codex-weixin-notifier
description: Send Weixin notifications and route numbered Codex tasks from Weixin.

interface.shortDescription: Notify Weixin and route numbered Codex tasks.
interface.longDescription: Adds a local Weixin/iLink workflow for Codex notifications plus a numbered task router where list shows tasks, task N switches the current Codex process, and ordinary Weixin text is forwarded to that task.
defaultPrompt: Help me configure Weixin completion notifications.
Send a test Codex completion notification.
